protocol: Seven production minizip-ng DEFLATE level 6 cases; one warm-up followed by three measured runs per case. The actual run nearest the elapsed_ms median is representative, with the earliest run breaking ties. openpyxl checks only the representative workbook after benchmark process timing.
temporary_worksheet_part_footprint_metri: worksheet body file bytes; not process RSS or total package assembly memory

source_report.sanitization: The tracked matrix report removes local absolute paths, commands, stdout and stderr while retaining all measured performance metrics, statistics, workload distribution and representative verification.

scope: Single Windows/MSVC machine and one dataset size. Supports bounded comparisons among the recorded strategies and workloads only; not a cross-machine or generalized performance claim.
